ASCII Design System — Interactive Explorer

5 char-sets · 4 patterns · closed-set glyph vocabulary v1 · plays the same characters that scripts/render-ascii.sh emits in CI tests.

Render

Token source: src/skills/ascii-visualizer/tokens.json · Renderer: scripts/render-ascii.sh 



    

      
Status glyph vocabulary (closed v1)

      

        
●
active / on / current
✗ generic bullet

        
○
inactive / off / pending
✗ decoration

        
✓
passed / completed
✗ decoration

        
✗
failed / blocked
✗ general "no"

        
⚠
warning / attention
✗ hard error

        
◆
primary / focused
✗ random emphasis

        
◇
secondary / unfocused
✗ decoration

        
▶
running / in-progress
✗ generic arrow

        
▷
paused / awaiting input
✗ generic arrow

      

      
Add-a-glyph process: see src/skills/ascii-visualizer/CONTRIBUTING.md
